title: disocactus × hybridus
intro: Disocactus × hybridus, also known as the night-blooming cereus or queen of the night, is a hybrid cactus species that combines the characteristics of Disocactus albo-lanatus and Strophocactus lophophoroides. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Disocactus × hybridus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, as well as its ability to act as a natural remedy for various skin conditions and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed as a natural remedy or used topically to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
